name: Nutkins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks that are not dry.
2. Gradually fold in the sifted confectioners' sugar and chopped pecans.
3. Add the vanilla extract.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until set.
6. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 10 minutes before removing them with a spatula.
Yield: approximately 20 cookies
